chosen: The Four-System Score: a repeatable framework for owners to rate their business 1-10 on Acquisition, Conversion, Operations, and Retention, with the rule that your real score is the lowest number, not the average.
rejected: Speed-to-lead framework (overused: appears in multiple recent best-performing posts, high repeat risk)
Lead-temperature triage framework for prioritizing which leads to call first (less directly tied to Black Arrow's actual method, lower brand relevance)
Follow-up channel escalation ladder (text, call, email order) (too close to prior cadence/script posts already shipped)
